curation_notes: The patch adds two new checks in the ALGnew function in src/block_template.c to reject IV parameters when ECB or CTR mode is selected. Before this fix, the IV length validation (IVlen != BLOCK_SIZE) was skipped for ECB and CTR modes, but the subsequent memcpy(new->IV, IV, IVlen) still copied the user-supplied IV into the fixed-size BLOCK_SIZE buffer, causing a heap-based buffer overflow. Only 1 non-test source file was modified. The pre-assigned class buffer-overflow is correct per both the CWE-119 mapping and the advisory description.
